settings.subtitle: Full-size pieces of every part of the system so you can test the install on one section of your metal building before ordering full rolls.
settings.secondary_cta_label: Send Photos for a Full-Building Quote

settings.text: 20 ft of BlueTex 2mm Pro 50″ — the same product used on full-building cover and repair installs
4 aluminum TermBars (48″) and the 1″ #10 hex screws to fasten them
30 ft of 3″ white vapor barrier seam tape for sealing the panels
Sample EasyClips for testing roofline attachment on red iron buildings
Show owners, tenants, or management exactly how the finished panel looks

settings.heading: Risk-Free Trial
settings.body: $100 credited back on any order of $500 or more.

settings.heading: Free Shipping
settings.body: Ships free in the contiguous USA.

settings.heading: Full-Size Materials
settings.body: Real product, not swatches. Test it on the building.

settings.heading: Real Person on the Phone
settings.body: We help you size up the order.

settings.heading: BlueTex 2mm Pro 50″
settings.body: A 20-foot length of our 50″-wide 2mm Pro material — the same roll material used on full-building Cover & Repair installs.

settings.heading: Aluminum TermBars
settings.body: Four 48″ aluminum TermBars for fastening BlueTex tight to the purlins and girts on a metal building.

settings.heading: 1″ #10 Hex Screws
settings.body: 5/16″ hex-head self-drillers used to attach the TermBars to the building framing.

settings.heading: 3″ White Vapor Barrier Seam Tape
settings.body: White seam tape for sealing the joints between BlueTex panels and maintaining the vapor barrier.

settings.heading: EasyClips
settings.body: Sample set of EasyClips for attaching BlueTex to the roofline on a red iron style building.

settings.question: Is the $100 really refundable?
settings.answer: It's redeemable, not refunded in cash. Place a follow-on order of $500 or more and we credit the $100 against the new order. One credit per $500 of purchase.

settings.question: Why 50″ wide and not something wider?
settings.answer: 50″ is the width we recommend for metal building cover and repair work — it lines up cleanly with standard purlin and girt spacing and keeps the install fast.

settings.question: Do I have to tear out the old insulation first?
settings.answer: Usually no. BlueTex is most often installed over the existing insulation.

settings.question: Will this work on a red iron building?
settings.answer: Yes. The kit includes a sample set of EasyClips specifically for attaching BlueTex to the roofline on a red iron style building, plus TermBars for the wall sections.

settings.question: How big a section can I cover with one kit?
settings.answer: One bay. The kit covers roughly 20 ft of 50″-wide material — enough to install one full TermBar run between two purlins or girts.

settings.question: What's the next step after I test the kit?
settings.answer: Send us photos of your building and the basic dimensions. We'll put together a material list and a quote. Use the $100 from the kit toward that order.

settings.heading: Ready for a Full-Building Material List?
settings.body: Send photos and rough dimensions of the building. We put together a material list and quote faster when we can see what you're working with — and your $100 sample-box credit goes toward the order.
